metrics.top_terms: claim, sequence, physics, model, does, paper, proof, theology, irreversible, formal, derivation, modification, theological, lean, structure

sections.title: The Turtles and the Floor
sections.text:
This paper argues that the Cross/Pentecost sequence is a candidate structural correspondence to irreversible coupling-architecture modification, with formal, empirical, and theological boundaries kept separate.
4

sections.title: Claim Maturity Level: Formal Model
sections.text:
Lean verifies internal structure only; empirical and theological claims remain separately tested.
Scale: 1 Metaphor -> 7 Public Proof Claim

sections.title: Proof Boundary
sections.text: This is a formal-model audit. It does not claim physics proves theology, and Lean compilation does not prove the external reality of the event.

sections.title: Forward / Reverse Test
sections.text:
Forward Physics operations generate a constrained transition sequence.
Reverse The theological sequence demands irreversibility, conservation, and no ordinary EM signature.

sections.title: FACTS Snapshot
sections.text:
F Frame
The anomaly is missing composition, not a missing component.

sections.title: A Admit
sections.text: Dual-substrate model is speculative; key derivation and category construction are incomplete.

sections.title: C Claim
sections.text: The sequence is structurally coherent under irreversible coupling modification.

sections.title: T Test
sections.text: Check symmetry-breaking, energy accounting, parameter derivation, EM invisibility, and historical discontinuity.

sections.title: S Snap
sections.text: One fatal kill condition breaks the model; multiple prediction failures collapse it.

sections.title: Kill Conditions
sections.text:
SSB reversible in required limit.
Energy non-conserved across full arc.
Key parameter derivation fails.
Unexpected EM signature appears.
Categorical contradiction found.

sections.title: Not Claimed
sections.text:
It does not claim that physics proves theology.
It does not claim the model is empirically complete.
It does not claim Lean proves the external reality of the event.
7Q Mini Grid
Q0 Posture Structural correspondence is tested, not assumed.
Q1 Identity The object is a proposed substrate-transition model.
Q2 Domain Physics analogy, formal structure, historical constraints, theology.
Q3 Claim Irreversible coupling modification models the sequence.
Q4 Support Formal structure, analogy class, evidence hooks.
Q5 Dependencies Requires prior framework layers and valid physical operation.
Q6 Consequences If strengthened, the mapping becomes more constrained.
Q7 Kill Conditions Reversibility, failed conservation, failed parameter derivation, categorical contradiction.

claims.facts_snapshot: No hard factual terms detected by deterministic pass.
claims.forward_test: If the claim is true, the described pattern should appear where the paper says it should appear.
claims.reverse_test: If the pattern can appear without the proposed framework, the claim should be downgraded or narrowed.
claims.evidence_bar: No explicit evidence marker in sentence.
claims.kill_conditions: Needs an explicit failure case: what observation, logic result, or counterexample would make this claim false?
claims.not_claimed: Does not by itself claim that physics proves theology.
claims.proof_boundary: Current boundary: deterministic pass classifies this as Public Proof Claim, not a final proof.
